sections.heading: Both hands combined home row
sections.body:
Practice these words and sentences:

Words: flask lad salad fall lass daffodil flash dash

A flask had a lad of salad.
Flash had a sad lass.
Dash falls all.

sections.heading: Practice Tips
sections.body:
1. Keep your eyes on the screen
2. Use proper finger placement
3. Start slow, accuracy first
4. Speed will come with practice

jargon.definition: Words Per Minute - typing speed measure

summary: Complete this lesson to improve your Both hands combined home row skills.
